message:
feat(mesh,store,conformance): gossip peer pruning, adversarial store tests, compliance expansion

New features and test hardening across multiple crates:

- fcp-mesh/gossip: add prune_stale_peers() method that removes peers
  exceeding a configurable staleness threshold, with unit test verifying
  correct pruning behavior (+74 lines)
- fcp-store: new adversarial corrupted symbols integration test that
  exercises the repair pipeline against intentionally malformed symbol
  table entries, validating graceful recovery (+149 lines)
- fcp-conformance/compliance: expanded compliance test suite with
  additional edge-case scenarios (+59 lines)
- fcp-conformance/integration_scenarios: updated scenario coverage
- fcp-graphql/subscription: minor reconnect handler fix for edge case
  in stream resumption
- fcp-host/doctor: additional self-check test adjustments
- fcp-sdk/migration: minor ConnectorRuntime lifecycle fix
- fcp-sdk/error_contract_tests: additional error mapping assertions
- fcp-bootstrap: Cargo.toml dependency update + workflow adjustment

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -63,6 +63,7 @@ windows = { version = "0.62", features = ["Win32_System_Time"] }
 
 [dev-dependencies]
 # Testing
+fcp-async-core = { path = "../fcp-async-core" }
 tokio-test = "0.4"
 pretty_assertions.workspace = true
 rand_chacha = "0.3"
